purpose: Top navigation bar of the app. Renders ModeMenu, Synapse logo (clickable to home), centered task badge + directory, and right-side action group: archive dropdown (Archive task / View Archive), History button, Electron-only Commands button, an 'N active' chats badge computed across all dashboards via claudeIsProcessing/claudeProcessingStash, and a Replanning badge when overall_status==='replanning'. Archive dropdown closes on outside-click via document mousedown listener gated by archiveOpen state. Export action exists (handleExport fetches /api/dashboards/:id/export and triggers a JSON download) but the button is currently hidden per code comment.
gotchas: Active-chat counter sums isProcessing across BOTH the current dashboard (claudeIsProcessing) and stashed dashboards (claudeProcessingStash[id].isProcessing) — easy to miss when adding new processing state.
handleArchiveTask calls window.electronAPI.archiveDashboard with the current dashboardId and silently swallows errors via .catch(()=>{}); failures don't surface in UI.
handleHistory and handleViewArchive both just dispatch SET_VIEW=home — the history/archive UIs live entirely in HomeView, not as separate routes.
patterns: Document-level mousedown listener pattern with ref+open-state for outside-click dropdown dismissal — repeated in ModeMenu, QueuePopup, Sidebar, ClaudeView quick-access editor.
Electron-only UI gated via useIsElectron() so SSE-only browser mode hides Commands.
conventions: Inline SVG icons rather than icon font/library.
Action buttons use class header-action-btn with optional modifier (header-commands-btn).
